title: You Deleted Everything and AWS Is Still Charging You
summary: AWS Developers tutorial explaining how surprise charges persist after deleting cloud resources, including orphaned RDS snapshots, EBS volumes, elastic IPs, and NAT gateways. Provides a step-by-step cleanup checklist and billing alarm setup to prevent unexpected charges on AWS accounts.
